description: Consolidated standards compliance registry for audit and regulatory traceability

standards.name: ISO 6166 — ISIN
standards.notes: All 50 products have valid ISIN identifiers

standards.name: ISO 10962 — CFI
standards.notes: All products have valid CFI codes

standards.name: ISO 4217 — Currency Codes
standards.full_name: Codes for the Representation of Currencies
standards.notes: USD, EUR, GBP, HKD currencies used

standards.name: ISO 3166-1 — Country Codes
standards.full_name: Codes for the Representation of Names of Countries
standards.notes: Valid country codes on venues and accounts

standards.name: ISO 8601 — Date/Time
fields_mapped: All date/time fields across all entities

standards.name: FIX Protocol
standards.notes: 6 of 50+ FIX tags mapped to entity fields

standards.name: EU MAR
fields_mapped: Detection models: wash_trading, spoofing, insider_dealing, market_manipulation, front_running
standards.notes: 5 detection models aligned with MAR market abuse types

standards.name: MiFID II
standards.full_name: Markets in Financial Instruments Directive II
standards.notes: Entity fields and surveillance obligations. Gaps: Art. 26 transaction reporting, Art. 27 best execution, RTS 6 algo trading

standards.name: Dodd-Frank Act
standards.full_name: Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act
standards.notes: Spoofing detection model aligned with §747 anti-spoofing provisions

standards.name: FINRA Rules
standards.notes: Wash trading and market manipulation detection aligned

standards.name: EMIR
standards.notes: Product entity supports derivative classification. Gap: Art. 9 transaction reporting

standards.name: SEC Rules
standards.notes: Detection models aligned with SEC anti-fraud and anti-manipulation rules

standards.name: ISO/IEC 11179:2023
fields_mapped: Business glossary term structure (Object Class + Property + Representation)
standards.notes: Full Parts 1-6 compliance in glossary term decomposition

standards.name: DAMA-DMBOK 2.0
fields_mapped: 11 knowledge areas mapped to platform capabilities
standards.notes: All 11 knowledge areas covered, 10 with high coverage

standards.name: FIBO
fields_mapped: fibo_class and fibo_namespace on glossary terms
standards.notes: Alignment via glossary term FIBO references, not full ontology implementation

standards.name: BCBS 239
standards.full_name: Principles for Effective Risk Data Aggregation and Risk Reporting
fields_mapped: bcbs239_principle on glossary terms and semantic metrics
standards.notes: Principles 3-5 (Accuracy, Completeness, Timeliness) mapped to metrics and terms

standards.name: ISO 20022
standards.full_name: Financial Services — Universal Financial Industry Message Scheme
standards.notes: Reference only — naming conventions aligned with ISO 20022 Business Concepts pattern

gap_standards.name: ISO 17442 — LEI
gap_standards.gap_description: No LEI field on account or trader entities

gap_standards.name: ISO 18774 — FISN
gap_standards.gap_description: No FISN field on product entity

gap_standards.name: EU SSR
gap_standards.gap_description: No short sell flag on orders or accounts

gap_standards.name: MiFID II RTS 6
gap_standards.gap_description: No algo ID on orders or executions

gap_standards.name: MiFID II Art. 27
gap_standards.gap_description: No venue comparison metrics for best execution analysis

gap_standards.name: ANNA DSB UTI
gap_standards.gap_description: No UTI field on executions for derivative reporting

gap_standards.name: SFTR
gap_standards.gap_description: Securities financing transactions not in scope

gap_standards.name: FCA MAR
gap_standards.gap_description: UK MAR not distinguished from EU MAR

gap_standards.name: ASIC/MAS/HKMA
gap_standards.gap_description: product.regulatory_scope=APAC exists but no specific APAC regulatory requirements
